manipulated_prompt_obj.inputs:
<PAD><PAD><PAD><PAD><PAD><PAD><PAD><PAD><BOS_TOKEN><|START_OF_TURN_TOKEN|><|USER_TOKEN|>You are playing a text adventure game. I will describe what you can perceive in the game. You write the single action you want to take in the game starting with >. Only reply with an action.
For example:
> open cupboard

In addition to common actions, you can bioch, snemic, intess, emood, oustion and erson.

Your goal for this game is: Make the torhy padery, the rot lotta and the astable preciny.

Once you have achieved your goal, write "> done" to end the game.

You are in a iscum now. There are a tisof, a torhy, a astable, a ishing, a hirry and a lonon. There is a passage to a ram here.<|END_OF_TURN_TOKEN|><|START_OF_TURN_TOKEN|><|CHATBOT_TOKEN|>
